title: Allow Modification of Default Home page, or access to widgets

posts.author: DrGerry (Gerald)
posts.cookedHtml:
So, I created an “Account Governance” page as instructed. But I couldn’t find out where to put it. So, I created a new Dashboard with Text widgets and added it there. The Account Governance template title says “Welcome to XXXXX monday.com home page”, so I assume this is supposed to be the Home Page. So, I changed the home page default to dashboard.

Now, there’s no way to access the default Home Page. There were some things on the default home page that were useful. I’d like to have the “My Workspaces” widget, and all the Learn & get inspired links.

Please give us:

  1. The ability to edit the Default Home Page so we can add things like Account Governance
  2. Access to the Widgets used on the Default Home Page to be added to our custom Home Page
